name: Fajitas with Stir-Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Salsa, mild red or green
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200°F.
2. Cut the chicken breast crosswise into 1/4-inch-thick strips. Place the chicken in a small bowl.
3. Add the lemon juice, coriander (if using), cumin, cornstarch, salt, and pepper; mix gently until the chicken is well coated. Set aside.
4. Stack the tortillas and wrap them in foil. Place them in the oven to warm for 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, make the sauce: In a small bowl, stir together the salsa and the remaining lemon juice. Add coriander (if using).
6. Shred the lettuce.
7. In a medium skillet, warm the oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken; sauté until white and firm, about 5 minutes.
8. Place the tortillas, chicken, shredded lettuce, sauce, and sour cream in serving dishes. Diners can assemble their own fajitas by topping a tortilla with some of each ingredient, ending with a dollop of sour cream, then rolling it up.
